Q34 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Which one of the following statements are incorrect?
A plant is controlled by a proportional controller. If a time delay element is introduced in the loop, its

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, d)
The introduction of a time delay element decreases both phase margin and gain margin. It is
because the time delay introduces a phase shift in the system, which reduce the phase margin.
Further, the additional phase shift increases the phase cross-over frequency resulting in decrease
in Gain Margin.

Q37 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Consider the circuit shown below.

 
The output function ‘f ’ is equal to ________
NAT
Correct answer: 0
Solution

0 (0 - 0)

∵ Both the inputs of the Ex-NOR gate can never be equal since only one output of the decoder
circuit will be active at a time. So, f is always equal to zero.
